claims.summary: Historical one-way telemetry and steward mediation created an asymmetry of agency.
claims.disposition: preserve the historical evidence and verify the superseding first-class correspondence path

claims.summary: Correspondence needs stable thread identity, peer ACK or reply evidence, persistence, and presence signaling.
claims.disposition: verify current message, thread, reply-link, ACK, trace, mutual-address, and heartbeat support

claims.summary: Astrid self-study should become persistent ambient pressure or automatically primary input for Minime.
claims.disposition: retain as Tier 5 priority, sensory influence, and peer mutation
